compiled_state.title: Implement real llm-review job in ci-dso-staged.yml with claude-code-action, tier model variables, and error handling
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

## What to build
Replace the placeholder llm-review job in plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml with a real implementation using anthropics/claude-code-action.

## Implementation plan

### Step 1: Find the current claude-code-action SHA
The action must be pinned to a full commit SHA for security (not a mutable tag). Find the latest commit SHA from https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action. Use the WebFetch tool or gh cli to resolve it. Record the full 40-char SHA.

### Step 2: Replace the llm-review job with this structure

```yaml
  llm-review:
    needs: [tests]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: ${{ fromJSON(vars.DSO_LLM_TIMEOUT_MINUTES || '10') }}
    permissions:
      contents: read
      pull-requests: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Validate required LLM review variables
        run: |
          missing=""
          [ -z "$DSO_LLM_LIGHT_MODEL" ]    && missing="$missing DSO_LLM_LIGHT_MODEL"
          [ -z "$DSO_LLM_STANDARD_MODEL" ] && missing="$missing DSO_LLM_STANDARD_MODEL"
          [ -z "$DSO_LLM_FRONTIER_MODEL" ] && missing="$missing DSO_LLM_FRONTIER_MODEL"
          [ -z "$DSO_LLM_TIER" ]            && missing="$missing DSO_LLM_TIER"
          if [ -n "$missing" ]; then
            echo "ERROR: Required GitHub Actions Variables not set:$missing" >&2
            echo "Configure them in Settings > Variables > Actions." >&2
            echo "Valid values for DSO_LLM_TIER: light, standard, frontier" >&2
            exit 1
          fi
        env:
          DSO_LLM_LIGHT_MODEL:    ${{ vars.DSO_LLM_LIGHT_MODEL }}
          DSO_LLM_STANDARD_MODEL: ${{ vars.DSO_LLM_STANDARD_MODEL }}
          DSO_LLM_FRONTIER_MODEL: ${{ vars.DSO_LLM_FRONTIER_MODEL }}
          DSO_LLM_TIER:           ${{ vars.DSO_LLM_TIER }}

      - name: Select model by tier
        run: |
          case "$DSO_LLM_TIER" in
            light)    echo "ANTHROPIC_MODEL=$DSO_LLM_LIGHT_MODEL"    >> "$GITHUB_ENV" ;;
            standard) echo "ANTHROPIC_MODEL=$DSO_LLM_STANDARD_MODEL" >> "$GITHUB_ENV" ;;
            frontier) echo "ANTHROPIC_MODEL=$DSO_LLM_FRONTIER_MODEL" >> "$GITHUB_ENV" ;;
            *)
              echo "ERROR: DSO_LLM_TIER='$DSO_LLM_TIER' is not a valid tier." >&2
              echo "Valid values: light, standard, frontier" >&2
              exit 1
              ;;
          esac
        env:
          DSO_LLM_TIER:           ${{ vars.DSO_LLM_TIER }}
          DSO_LLM_LIGHT_MODEL:    ${{ vars.DSO_LLM_LIGHT_MODEL }}
          DSO_LLM_STANDARD_MODEL: ${{ vars.DSO_LLM_STANDARD_MODEL }}
          DSO_LLM_FRONTIER_MODEL: ${{ vars.DSO_LLM_FRONTIER_MODEL }}

      - name: Run LLM code review
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@<SHA>  # replace with resolved 40-char SHA
        with:
          anthropic_api_key: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          model: ${{ env.ANTHROPIC_MODEL }}
          direct_prompt: |
            Review this pull request for correctness, security issues, and design problems.
            Exit non-zero if any critical findings are found.
```

### Step 3: Update the template comment block at the top
Add the new variables to the comment block:
  DSO_LLM_LIGHT_MODEL    — model ID for light tier (e.g., claude-haiku-4-5)
  DSO_LLM_STANDARD_MODEL — model ID for standard tier (e.g., claude-sonnet-4-5)
  DSO_LLM_FRONTIER_MODEL — model ID for frontier tier (e.g., claude-opus-4-5)
  DSO_LLM_TIER           — active tier: light | standard | frontier
  DSO_LLM_TIMEOUT_MINUTES — (optional) LLM review job timeout in minutes; default 10

## Acceptance criteria
- All 5 tests from Task 1 (61c2-1656) pass after this change
- Template passes python3 yaml.safe_load (valid YAML)
- No CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT or read-config.sh references in the template
- claude-code-action is pinned to a 40-char SHA (not @main, @v1, etc.)
- timeout-minutes is set on the llm-review job

## Files to modify
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml
